title: Resolution Encouraging All Business Establishments, Hospitals, Schools and Institutions Within the Municipality of Los Baños to Provide Hand Sanitizer or Alcohol-based Hand Rub to Promote Hand Hygiene to the Public and Prevent the Spread of Infectious Diseases and Requesting the Municipal Health Office and the Public Information Office to Take the Lead in Disseminating Such Information to Concerned Stakeholders. (AUTHOR(S): Councilor(s) Miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Mar
